name: Completed cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry has no posted results
summary: A completed telomerase-activator Alzheimer disease registry is boundary context, not direct TA-65 evidence.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT02530255 as a completed cycloastragenol retinal amyloid registry with 48 participants and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Adults aged 50 to 70 years in an Alzheimer disease retinal-amyloid context
time_horizon: Study completion listed on 2018-12-31; no posted results as of the June 10, 2026 API view
quantitative_note: Actual enrollment was 48; primary outcome was retinal amyloid index.
caveats: The registry tests cycloastragenol, not branded TA-65.
The Alzheimer disease retinal-amyloid endpoint is disease-boundary context for the broad telomerase-restoration track.
No-results registry status is not evidence of efficacy.
